## What problem does this solve?

Describe a failure class or harness gap you've hit.

## Proposed pattern

What would the harness change be? A new verification check? A council debate seat? An auto-patch class?

## Evidence

Any logs, failure counts, or patterns you've observed.

## Constraints

Any limitations or tradeoffs to consider.
